curve_form.description: Relative value in [0.0, 1.0] — fraction of positional peak PPG. Ascent phase: linear from base_value at entry_age to 1.0 at peak_age. Decline phase: linear from 1.0 at onset_of_decline_age, decreasing at decline_slope_per_year, floored at 0.0.

RB.notes: Steepest decline in the position group. Physical demands drive the earliest peak and sharpest cliff. Aligns with CLIFF_AGES[RB]=26 in roster auditor.

WR.notes: Route running development drives gradual ascent. Moderate physical decline after 28. Aligns with CLIFF_AGES[WR]=28.

TE.notes: Blocking skill development and role complexity produce the slowest ascent. Durability extends careers past most skill positions. Aligns with CLIFF_AGES[TE]=30.

QB_pocket.notes: Cognitive mastery and pocket processing drive the latest peak. Gradual decline. Aligns with Q3/Q4 decision record: pocket passer cliff ~33.

QB_dual_threat.notes: Mobile QB physical decay resembles WR pattern; rushing value degrades faster than pocket processing. Classification: rushing yards > 400/season in any T-2 to T. Aligns with Q3/Q4: dual-threat onset ~29.
